data.body:
PHASE 2 done — epic 81e2 CLAIMED (in_progress, joe-oakhart).
Epic plan-review re-run: PASS blocking=0 advisory=13 (attestation re-signed fresh at HEAD 43d154523; the prior one was stale from origin/main drift).
ADVISORY TRIAGE (PASS, so none blocking; applying the ones that genuinely help):
 - G4 (ordering): 5b01 sweep excludes examples/ but had no depends_on->46f8; if run out of order the epic AC rg -l 'examples/claude-skills'==0 could fail. APPLIED: added depends_on 5b01->46f8 (stack already orders 46f8 below 5b01).
 - G3/E3/F1/ISF (955c unverifiable): CLAUDE.local.md is git-ignored so 'no guidance lost' can't be CI-checked. PLAN: when working 955c, record a concrete removed-rule -> new-home(AGENTS.md/docs) mapping as an attestation comment (operator-attested evidence), not just 'reviewer confirms'.
 - T7/T5e (no ADR): AGENTS.md-as-canonical is a one-way-door decision. PLAN: add a lightweight ADR in S2.
 - T1 (unverified provider/governance claims): keep authored AGENTS.md/template provider wording measured; don't overclaim the 11-provider list / LF-governance as fact without hedging.
STRATEGY: because plan-review attestations go stale when HEAD moves and my own commits advance HEAD, I will review-plan + CLAIM all 7 children up front at HEAD 43d154523 (claim gate is the only thing needing a fresh attestation; close uses completion-verifier). Launching child reviews in 2 concurrent background batches.
